settings.title:
Targeted Brightening That Works
A serum for EVEN TONE + CLEAR, RADIANT SKIN.
what's inside
settings.intro: A potent brightening serum formulated to target dark spots, even skin tone, and enhance natural radiance.
settings.footer_text:
TRANEXAMIC ACID (4%)
 helps visibly reduce dark spots and discoloration
NIACINAMIDE (10%)
 supports even tone and improves dullness
also made with Vitamin C, Alpha Arbutin, Hyaluronic Acid, Glycerin, Panthenol, Vitamin E, peptides, and botanical extracts for hydration, barrier support, and glowing skin

settings.description: SAID THEIR SKIN LOOKED MORE EVEN
SAID DARK SPOTS LOOKED LESS VISIBLE
SAID THEY NOTICED IMPROVED SKIN CLARITY

settings.footnote: Based on a 2-week consumer perception study with consistent daily use.

settings.question: Can I use this serum every day?
settings.answer: Yes, it is suitable for daily use, both morning and night.

settings.question: Is it suitable for sensitive skin?
settings.answer: Yes, it includes soothing ingredients, but patch testing is recommended.

settings.question: Does it help with dark spots and pigmentation?
settings.answer: Yes, it is designed to target discoloration and improve uneven tone.

settings.question: Can I layer it with other skincare products?
settings.answer: Yes, it works well with moisturizers, sunscreens, and other gentle actives.

settings.question: Do I need to use sunscreen with this?
settings.answer: Yes, sunscreen is essential during the day to protect and maintain results.

settings.title: FAQ
settings.subtitle: Find out more about the Tranexamic Serum.
